panels.title: RPM — Rotational Speed
panels.description: Spindle speed over time. PWF warning fires when power (torque x rpm) exceeds 9000W or drops below 3500W.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sensor_data")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rpm")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 10s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Torque (Nm)
panels.description: Machine torque. High torque combined with high tool wear triggers OSF (Overstrain Failure).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sensor_data")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "torque_nm")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 10s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Process Temperature (K)
panels.description: Machine cutting temperature. HDF fires when temp delta (process - air) drops below 8.6K AND rpm below 1380.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sensor_data")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "process_temp_k")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 10s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Tool Wear (minutes)
panels.description: Cumulative tool wear. TWF warning at 200 min, critical at 220 min — tool fracture imminent.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sensor_data")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tool_wear_min")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 10s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Early Warnings Issued
panels.description: Count of rows where our detector fired WARNING or CRITICAL but actual_failure was still 0. This is our proof of value — catching failures before they happen.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sensor_data")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "alert")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "early_warning")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == 1)
  |> count()

panels.title: Actual Failures in Dataset
panels.description: Count of rows where machine_failure = 1 in the AI4I dataset. Compare this against early warnings to see how many we caught in advance.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sensor_data")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "alert")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "actual_failure")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == 1)
  |> count()

panels.title: Active Alerts — Latest
panels.description: Most recent WARNING and CRITICAL alerts with failure type and message.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sensor_data")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "alert")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "early_warning")
  |> tail(n: 20)
